selection_criteria: AUC > 0.55 on Track B dev, pruned |r| > 0.85 pairs

pruned.bin_110_cid_max: kept despite r=0.852 with bin_100_cid_max — both above threshold

notes: 12 density_max features + 2 metadata features. All _min features excluded (AUC < 0.55). Limit features excluded (below threshold or redundant).
